channel.title: Chandra Kanojia Perspectives
channel.description: Perspectives on enterprise AI, operating models, workflow, governance, and value realization.

item.title: When AI Does Not Change the Operating Model
item.description: Task productivity is useful. Operating leverage is different.

item.title: Controlled Autonomy in Regulated Enterprises
item.description: Why boundaries, evidence, escalation, and ownership are part of the enterprise AI product.
